{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Endross lightning
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] was badly burned by [[Endross lightning]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Indirial]] compares his pain to being hit by an [[Endross lightning]] bolt.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
